insights.trajectory: Dashboard expanding with mobile UI, git service improvements, and project insights. 11 modified files represent the largest uncommitted changeset across all projects.

insights.trajectory: Deep exploration of factoring-period-synchrony progressed through D-PS-32 to D-PS-38 with Laplace asymptotics and nonlocal transforms. Now branching into multiple new analytic-divisibility problem variants.
insights.nextSteps: Commit the 5 modified and 9 untracked files - new problem directories (analytic-divisibility-barriers, -hyperbolic, -quantum, -transforms) represent significant research branching that should be preserved.
insights.reasoning: 5 modified + 9 untracked files show very active work. Research has spawned 4 new problem sub-areas. Paper and formalized conjecture added. Research-driven project with unpredictable trajectory.

insights.reasoning: 17 modified files is a large uncommitted changeset. Recent commits added label-based generation, panel layouts, and manufacturing outputs. Actively evolving tool.

insights.trajectory: Successfully migrated from Arduino to pure ESP-IDF. Obsolete demos and LVGL files cleaned up. Clean working tree indicates migration is complete and stable.

insights.trajectory: Replaced discrete NPN drivers with ULN2804AN for V2.2. Reed relay analysis, Zener protection, and multiple design reviews complete. Hardware design is stabilizing.

insights.reasoning: Clean tree, multiple design review commits. Component swaps (ULN2804AN, Zener protection) and punch list reviews are classic signs of hardware design convergence.
